# Best AI Image Generators for Infographics in 2026

Infographics make complex data accessible and shareable. AI tools help you create stunning infographics faster than ever!

Check out our [[link:/category/Image|Image category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]]: Infographic Design

[[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]] offers powerful features for creating infographics.

### Canva for Infographics
- **Infographic templates**: Hundreds of data visualization templates
- **Magic Edit**: Modify infographic elements with AI
- **Brand kit**: Maintain consistent branding

**Try Canva**: https://canva.com

---

## [[link:/tools/1|Midjourney]]: Custom Illustration

[[link:/tools/1|Midjourney]] creates unique illustrations and icons for infographics.

### Midjourney for Infographics
- **Custom illustrations**: Unique visuals for your data
- **Icon generation**: Create matching icon sets
- **Style consistency**: Maintain visual coherence

**Try Midjourney**: https://midjourney.com
